description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Phasar CI that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to build Phasar with different compilers, build types, and configurations. For each build, check out the repository, install dependencies, set up Swift 5.8.1, build Phasar with CMake and Ninja, and run unit tests.
